result.stdout:
Description:
  Installs shaders from Windows Terminal Shader Gallery into Windows Terminal

Usage:
  wt-shader-tool [options]

Options:
  -i, --install <install>  The id of the shader to install
  -l, --list               List all shaders in gallery
  -v, --verbose            Verbose mode
  -p, --preview            Target Windows Terminal Preview
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Installs shaders from Windows Terminal Shader Gallery into Windows Terminal

Usage:
  wt-shader-tool [options]

Options:

  -l, --list               List all shaders in gallery
  -v, --verbose            Verbose mode
  -p, --preview            Target Windows Terminal Preview
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
